sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# ACTION7 shifts everything down by 6 rows
# After ACTION7 + UP, we're back to original state
# Blue block always above player when player at top
# 
# Let me try ACTION7 again, then immediately RIGHT to see if path can reach blue block

result = action(['ACTION7', 'RIGHT'])
print("ACTION7+RIGHT result:", result)

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("\nBlocks in room:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'N', 'b']:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(x[0] for x in b)
        minc = min(x[1] for x in b)
        maxr = max(x[0] for x in b)
        maxc = max(x[1] for x in b)
        if minr < 54:
            print(f"  {n['color']}: rows {minr}-{maxr}, cols {minc}-{maxc}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] >= 18:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(x[0] for x in b)
        maxr = max(x[0] for x in b)
        print(f"Player: rows {minr}-{maxr}")
        break

print("\nAround player:")
for r in range(18, 30):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][8:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
